rationale: Review 1 correctly flags a real naming issue (camelCase `notMem` in a snake_case theorem name), but its proposed fix (drop the suffix entirely to `finrank_adjoin_simple_eq_two`) is debatable and could lose descriptiveness; its other two findings are contested style preferences. The net improvement from acting on Review 1 is uncertain enough that the resulting PR would not be meaningfully better than leaving it as Review 2 approves.
